stemHtml: Consider an aircraft flying in unaccelerated level flight in the speed stable region. What would be the result on Indicated Airspeed (IAS) and drag following a sudden decrease in aircraft speed with no change in thrust available?

options.a: IAS would further decrease due to the increased drag.
options.b: IAS would increase due to the increased drag.
options.c: IAS would increase due to the decreased drag.
options.d: IAS would further decrease due to the decreased drag.
